title: Routing Manifest
description: One workflow stage's declared execution contract. Constitution Principles XV-XX, XXIII, XXIV. This is a declaration the verifier checks; it does not route.

skill.description: The workflow stage this manifest governs. Must appear in the constitution's Skill Routing Catalog.

provider_env.description: Name of the environment variable carrying the provider. Principle XIX: never a literal provider name.

model_env.description: Name of the environment variable carrying the model. Principle XIX: never a literal model identifier.

reasoning_effort.description: Effort on the closed ladder. Principle XXIII: no provider-native knob is permitted anywhere in this manifest.

color.description: 24-bit log color as a hex value.

terminal_ansi.description: ANSI SGR code(s) for a plain terminal. Principle XVI: a harness with no 24-bit color must still render the stage.

max_total_tokens.description: Spending ceiling in tokens. Principle XVII: absent, zero, or negative aborts the stage.

action_on_limit.description: Behavior when the ceiling is reached. truncate_context is permitted only for non-writing stages (checked by the verifier).

truncation_priority.description: Context sources to drop, lowest priority first. Required exactly when action_on_limit is truncate_context.

parallelism_mode.description: serial runs one unit at a time; waves runs bounded concurrent units.

max_concurrent_agents.description: Concurrency cap. Principle XVIII: required when parallelism_mode is waves (checked by the verifier).

enabled.description: Whether this stage retrieves context from the graphify knowledge graph. Principle XXIV: absence of graphify degrades to a warning, never an error.

query_budget_tokens.description: Token budget for retrieval, counted against the stage's total. Required when enabled is true (checked by the verifier).

output.description: The single file this stage owns exclusively, or null when it owns no single file. Principle XVIII: no two stages may declare the same output.

writes_artifacts.description: Whether the stage writes artifacts at all. Principle XVII: a writing stage may not use truncate_context.
